title: Ex-Ditector Policy Gate Input
description: Define what you are auditing. Only compliant scope types are selectable — tracking private individuals or romantic/dating inference is not offered by this product.

scope_type.title: Scope type
scope_type.description: What kind of audit this is. Only compliant scopes exist. Prohibited scopes (private-person tracking, romance/dating inference) are intentionally not present and cannot be selected.
enumTitles: Self — audit my own public footprint
Consented — a person who gave me written authorization
Public figure — a genuine public figure acting publicly
Brand — a company/brand/product I am entitled to monitor
Safety evidence — preserve public evidence of harm directed at me

subject_label.title: Subject label
subject_label.description: A non-identifying label for the audit (e.g. 'My LinkedIn', 'Acme Corp'). Do not enter another private person's personal details.

target_urls.title: Target URLs
target_urls.description: Public, logged-out URLs to audit/monitor. Login-walled private social hosts (Instagram, Facebook, Tinder, etc.) are blocked.

authorization_evidence_url.title: Authorization evidence URL (required for 'consented')
authorization_evidence_url.description: A URL pointing to written consent from the subject. REQUIRED when scope_type is 'consented'; ignored otherwise.

max_pages.title: Max pages (cost cap)
max_pages.description: Hard cap on pages crawled, to bound cost and avoid hammering sources.

checks_per_day.title: How often do you currently check this yourself? (per day)
checks_per_day.description: Wellbeing signal only. Used to compute distress_risk_score and offer Closure Mode. Never used to track anyone.
